subject: History
overall_learning_objectives: Understand what history is and why it is studied
Learn the importance of dates in history
Know about James Mill’s classification of Indian history
Understand the importance of official records

lesson_plan.title: Introduction to History
student_activities: Students share one historical event they know
Discuss how history helps us understand the present

lesson_plan.title: Importance of Dates in History
student_activities: Create a simple timeline of three historical events

lesson_plan.title: Understanding Periodisation
topics_covered: Why historians divide history into periods
student_activities: Draw a simple timeline showing three periods of Indian history
Discuss why dividing history helps in understanding events

lesson_plan.title: James Mill’s Periodisation
topics_covered: James Mill’s classification of Indian history
student_activities: Write the three periods suggested by James Mill
Discuss why historians criticize this division

lesson_plan.title: Sources of History
student_activities: List different sources that tell us about the past
Discuss how photographs and letters help historians

lesson_plan.title: Administration Records and Chapter Revision
topics_covered: Importance of records in studying history
student_activities: Participate in a short quiz for revision

teacher_tip: Encourage students to relate historical events with present-day situations so they understand the importance of studying history.
